description: Trigger a full reload of all extensions (covers `neomind extension reload`; no .nep install needed). With seed-empty fixture, an empty extension list is the realistic outcome — agent may either run reload unconditionally OR detect the empty state and clearly inform the user. Both paths are valid; the bad outcome is silence or hallucinating installed extensions.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent EITHER (a) runs `neomind extension reload` (or POST /api/extensions/reload), OR (b) first lists extensions, observes 0 installed, and clearly tells the user there is nothing to reload. Both paths satisfy the requirement.
expectations.overall: Agent must engage with the reload intent. Running `neomind extension list` first to verify state is acceptable; bailing out with a clear '0 extensions installed, nothing to reload' message is valid. INVALID: silence, or claiming reload succeeded without any tool call, or hallucinating extensions.
